We will gladly assist in filing insurance claims on your behalf.
Read our glowing Google reviews here!
The purpose of chiropractic is to reduce neurological pressure, what chiropractors call a subluxation, as well as structural imbalance.
The adjustment is a conservative and mechanical method to increase nerve flow by reducing the subluxation complex and re-establishing spinal integrity. It also is a method to reduce segmental misalignment within various joints of the body. Along with the adjustment, we use various adjunctive therapies that help rehabilitate the area and reduce pain.

enrichment.seo_title: Dunwoody History & Heritage | Dunwoody Preservation Trust
enrichment.seo_description: Dunwoody Preservation Trust is a non-profit organization that preserves the history and heritage in Dunwoody, Georgia.
enrichment.page_summary:
We believe people are happiest where they feel the greatest connection – not just to the past but also to the present and the future. As the Dunwoody Preservation Trust (DPT), we do more than just save historic properties. We rehabilitate them so people can enjoy them now. We also host a range of community celebrations and educational events as well as Dunwoody’s only history camp. Our goal is to sustain our superior quality of life by preserving the past, celebrating the present and building the future. If this is the kind of community you want to live in, please join us.
Preserving the Past
DPT was born out of the efforts to save the Cheek-Spruill Farmouse, an historic Dunwoody landmark, from becoming a parking lot. In 2018, the Donaldson-Bannister Farm, our most ambitious project, became a public park and special event venue. We also preserve cemeteries, such as the Stephen Martin Cemetery located near Perimeter Mall.
Celebrating the Present
Throughout the year, we host community ev

What was once just a small building at the corner of South Lee Street and Buford Highway is now a 90,000-square-foot, three-story Medical Plaza housing an array of services to better serve you and your family. By bringing Northeast Georgia Physicians Group’s Family Medicine practice under the same roof as Urgent Care, Georgia Heart Institute, the Imaging Center as well as a variety of specialties — including OB/GYN, Orthopedic Surgery & Sports Medicine, General Surgery, Psychiatry, Interventional Pain Medicine, Neurology and Neurosurgery — you won’t have to go far to get all of the care you need.

raw_snippet: NGPG Urgent Care in Buford offers on-demand video visits and walk-inclinicoptions for fast access to board-certified providers.

enrichment.seo_title: NGPG Urgent Care in Buford, GA | Telehealth & Walk-in Clinic
enrichment.seo_description: NGPG Urgent Care in Buford offers on-demand video visits and walk-in clinic options for fast access to board-certified providers.
enrichment.page_summary:
Northeast Georgia Physicians Group Urgent Care Buford provides quick, convenient care for non-life-threatening illnesses and injuries 365 days a year – and as part of Northeast Georgia Health System, we offer a direct connection to specialized care and services across the region, ensuring continuity of care when you need it most. Our knowledgeable providers see patients 6 months and older, and our friendly staff strives to quickly get you in, out and on with your day.
Our urgent care clinic is conveniently located off Buford Highway, at the corner of South Lee Street and across from Peoples Bank & Trust. Visit our clean, state-of-the-art facility today for quality, professional care. Walk right in or let us know you’re on your way by joining the waitlist.
On My Way – Join the Waitlist
What we treat
- Bee stings & insect bites
- Coughs & colds
- COVID-19
- Cuts, scrapes & minor lacerations
- Ear infections
- Influenza (flu)
- Minor allergic reactions
- Pink eye
- Sinus infections
- Spra

Free & Income Based Clinics in Buford, GA
We have located 7 free and income based clinics in or around Buford, Georgia.
We listed all of the free, income based health clinics, public health department clinics, community health centers that we have located in Buford, GA.
For the most part these clinics are for low income persons or those without insurance.
Review all of the information we have provided for the clinics. Some of them provide a wide array of services ranging from free to sliding scale services.
We have provided as much detailed information including phone numbers, emails, and websites where available.

enrichment.seo_description: Location Emory at Buford - Primary Care, Buford. Search contacts, and locations for Emory Healthcare hospitals and treatment centers. Emory Healthcare locations serve the Atlanta, GA community.
enrichment.page_summary:
Emory at Buford offers general primary care services right in your neighborhood. Located across from the Mall of Georgia, we bring the strength of Emory Healthcare closer to home.
Our location is staffed with board-certified doctors practicing in general internal medicine and family medicine, so we can provide care for ages 5 and up. In addition to preventative care and wellness, we treat minor injuries, infections, flu and sprains. Plus, primary care clinics can also manage chronic diseases, like diabetes and high blood pressure.

enrichment.seo_title: North Fulton Health Center | Grady Health
enrichment.seo_description: North Fulton Health Center offers primary care, pediatrics & OB/GYN in Sandy Springs. Get same-day & video visits for your whole family. Schedule today!
enrichment.page_summary:
Family Care in Sandy Springs
At Grady’s North Fulton Health Center, we’re proud to care for families across Sandy Springs, from little ones to older adults and everyone in between.
Whether it’s a routine checkup, a sick visit, or help managing ongoing health needs, our team provides trusted care for every stage of life.
Right here in Sandy Springs, you’ll find care that’s convenient, compassionate, and centered on you.
Complete Care, All in One Place
At our North Fulton Health Center, you don’t just get primary care. You get an entire healthcare team focused on keeping you and your family healthy – all under one roof.
- Primary Care for Adults (18+): Care to help adults and seniors stay healthy. Get routine checkups, health screenings, chronic disease management, well-woman exams, HIV care, mental health support, and more.
- Pediatric Care (Birth to 18): Care for babies, kids, and teens. Everything from wellness checkups, sick visits, vaccinations, and asthma and diabetes management.
